title: Buying Movie Tickets
scene: 你在电影院售票处买票。

turns.en: Hi, which showtime?
The seven o'clock action movie, two tickets.
Middle back or closer to the front?

turns.cn: 中间靠后吧，有学生折扣吗？
turns.en: Middle back, please. Any student discount?

turns.cn: 出示学生证减两元，一共二十六。
turns.en: Two off with student ID. Twenty-six total.
Can I add a popcorn combo?

turns.cn: 加十二块，七号厅在这边。
turns.en: Twelve more. Theater seven is this way.
How much is admission for adults?
Twenty-five. It's free on Wednesday evenings.
Are there any special exhibits today?

turns.cn: 三楼有古埃及展，含在门票里。
turns.en: Ancient Egypt on the third floor, included in admission.
Are photos allowed?

turns.cn: 一般展区可以，不要开闪光灯。
turns.en: Yes in most areas. No flash, please.
Where can I rent an audio guide?

title: Concert Tickets
scene: 你在线下票务点买演唱会票。

turns.en: Which artist's show?

turns.cn: 下周五泰勒·斯威夫特的，还有票吗？
turns.en: Taylor Swift next Friday. Any tickets left?

turns.cn: 只剩看台后排，每张一百二。
turns.en: Only upper deck left, a hundred twenty each.
I'll take two seats together.

turns.cn: 电子票发您邮箱，凭手机入场。
turns.en: E-tickets to your email. Show your phone at the gate.
What time does it start?
Seven thirty. I'd arrive by six thirty.
How many people, and how long?
Four of us, two hours.

turns.cn: 鞋码多少？租鞋每人五块。
turns.en: Shoe sizes? Rental is five per person.

turns.cn: 八九十十一，我们要轻球。
turns.en: Eight, nine, ten, eleven. We'd like lighter balls.
Lane six is open. The screen keeps score.
Can we order pizza to the lane?
Yes. Menu's on the table.

title: Streaming at Home
scene: 你和室友商量晚上看什么。

turns.cn: 今晚看啥？我找到了一部新剧。
turns.en: What should we watch? I found a new series.

turns.cn: 悬疑的还是喜剧？我脑子累了。
turns.en: Thriller or comedy? My brain is fried.

turns.cn: 喜剧吧，八集，每集半小时。
turns.en: Comedy. Eight episodes, thirty minutes each.

turns.cn: 行，我爆米花已经微波好了。
turns.en: Sure. I already microwaved popcorn.

turns.cn: 用谁的账号？我那边登不上了。
turns.en: Whose account? Mine won't log in.
Use mine. Don't stream on too many devices.
Okay. Episode one is starting!
